Great salespeople are never ever satisfied and they push themselves to the next levels of production and I know what you're saying you're like dude what do you mean I can't ever be satisfied never never be satisfied don't let the average mediocre people on this planet convince you to be satisfied how are you gonna do great if you're satisfied with good how are you gonna do the next level if you're even satisfied with being the best look you don't even want to be the best you want to not be satisfied keep reaching that's what greats do the greats compare to their potential they never compared to others or to the past they compared to what's next what can I do next how can I reach my full potential this is what motivates them this is what inspires the greats they don't care about what others are doing or saying or achieving they get honest with themselves they have a very high sense of their personal ethics which means their personal responsibility to achieve their potential good is not good enough for the greats they don't compete they want to dominate
